content.en:
The Void Will Realm.

Ye Tian began to try to condense the will pagoda, and the extreme will on his body began to condense into the appearance of a pagoda in a special way, the pagoda was very illusory at first, and gradually became condensed.

However, at a certain moment, the Pagoda of Will had a violent shock and collapsed directly.

"Sure enough, it failed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

A success is indeed unrealistic, and he is not so rebellious.

If it weren't for the copying talent, he might have died a long time ago, where could he have grown to this extent.

Therefore, except for his talent, he is no worse than those super-perfect controllers in other aspects.

And the Pagoda of Condensation of Will has nothing to do with talent.

In the following years, Ye Tian kept trying to condense the Will Pagoda, failing again and again, but every time he failed, he could sum up some experience.

And at this moment, Ye Tian had another way to condense the Will Pagoda faster, and that was to use the second copy body to try to condense the Will Pagoda at all costs.

This attempt causes the replicating body to collapse, i.e., die.

Strictly speaking, the Pagoda of Will attempt in the Void Will Realm is the safest way to try, and condensing the Pagoda of Will in a very simple way with a very small number of Extreme Dao wills, even if it fails, it will not have much impact.

But this kind of safe way will lead to a very low success rate, and the condensed will pagoda will also be very weak, although it can be slowly improved in the later stage, but the growth rate is slow!

Now, after Ye Tian knew the Will Pagoda very well, he felt that he could condense most of the Extreme Dao Will Pagoda and build a very powerful Will Pagoda, and the potential would be terrifying.

And the will doppelganger cannot try to condense, it must be the ontology.

This is also the reason why the super-perfect master does not dare to do this, otherwise once he fails, his life will be gone.

But Ye Tian is not afraid, if the copy body dies, it will die, just copy one more.

Therefore, this is also what Ye Tiancai dares to do.

"Let's do it, I have a copy of the body anyway, it doesn't matter if I try again and again. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian tried here, and soon the first attempt failed, and the copy body was shattered, even if his life-saving ability was very strong, but the overall will was shattered, and the physical body naturally could not be preserved, and he would definitely die.

"It's really dangerous, no wonder other super-perfect controllers don't dare to try, someone has definitely tried it before, but this method is included in the taboo!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He tried again and again, of course, all failed, and the success rate of this method was too low.

In addition, Ye Tian's copy body in the Void Will Realm is also continuing to try to condense the Will Pagoda, mainly to accumulate experience.

The two bodies condense the Pagoda of Will in different ways, and by combining with each other, many mistakes can be avoided.

And just like that, hundreds of millions of eternal years passed.

Before you know it, more than three billion eternal years have passed.

In fact, Ye Tian could already successfully condense the Will Pagoda, but only in the Void Will Realm, but whenever he was about to successfully condense the Will Pagoda, he would quickly stop and let the Will Pagoda fail.

After all, he didn't want to really condense the Pagoda of Will.

Because once the Will Pagoda is condensed, it is not allowed to continue to practice in the Void Will Realm, which is also to vacate a place.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai would not condense the Will Pagoda in the Void Will Realm, he would have to stay here for a few more days.

In the blink of an eye, more than a billion eternal years have passed.

this day.

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian once again condensed the Will Pagoda, this time he was very confident, so last time he was only the last trace away from being able to completely condense it.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!!

Most of the Extreme Dao Wills began to condense and compress into the Will Pagoda, and gradually, the first layer of the Will Pagoda changed from illusory to real.

However, this is just the beginning.

After a while, the second layer of the Will Pagoda also began to condense, and then the third layer......

Ye Tian's current Extreme Dao Will can condense the three-layer Will Pagoda, this is the safest decision, if it is condensed into the Four-Layer Will Pagoda, all the Extreme Dao Will will have to be added to it, which is unrealistic.

Therefore, he could only condense three layers of the Will Pagoda at most.

As soon as it is condensed, it is a three-layer will pagoda, which is already something that other powerhouses who have condensed the will pagoda dare not imagine.

With the passage of time, the Pagoda of Will gradually condensed to three floors, and became more and more condensed.

After a long time, with a special fluctuation, the Pagoda of Will was completely condensed, turned into a whole, and began to absorb the energy of the will and strengthen the Pagoda of Will.

At the same time, Ye Tian took out a large number of Extreme Dao Treasures that restored his will, and continued to refine them, making the aura of the Will Pagoda stronger and stronger.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian stopped, his face full of joy.

Initially condensed the Pagoda of Will, he clearly felt that his will had broken some kind of shackles and could continue to improve, and it improved very quickly.

For example, just now, he has refined a lot of extreme treasures that have improved his will, and his will has increased by more than ten times, and it is still improving.

"The Will Pagoda is too terrifying, originally my Extreme Dao Will has been raised to the current limit, and I can't continue to improve it even bit, but after I improve the Will Pagoda, it has increased more than ten times in a short period of time, no wonder the cultivators at the end of the realm can compete with the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the role of the Will Pagoda is too great!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is also the creativity of many perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, which can create the Pagoda of Will, otherwise where would there be such a situation as it is now!

"The road is opened up, only by constantly creating, can we continue to progress!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Although the Will Pagoda was condensed, Ye Tian still did not immediately attack the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, he wanted to wait for his Extreme Will to be raised to the current limit before attacking the Perfect Controller of the Infinite Realm.

The years are like traces, and before you know it, billions of eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will had increased several times, but now it had entered the point of slow improvement, and it was difficult to continue to improve it significantly.

In addition, Ye Tian condensed another layer of Will Pagoda.

At present, his Pagoda of Will is a four-story Pagoda of Will.

"It's almost time to break through, let's let the copy body of the Void Will Realm condense the Will Pagoda first!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently, the copy body of the Void Will Realm easily condensed the Will Pagoda, which was also for them to see, otherwise he would suddenly reveal the Will Pagoda in the future, which was not easy to explain.

Moreover, only by showing talent can you hope to get more benefits.

For example, if he hadn't entered the first place on the killing list in the Extreme Genius Battle, I am afraid that he would not have been able to enter the Void Will Realm, let alone know the secrets of the Will Pagoda.

So, there was no need for him to hide too deeply.

The Void Will Realm.

After Ye Tian condensed the Will Pagoda, he was immediately detected by the Void Will Realm and was quickly repelled out.

At the same time, the news that he had condensed the Pagoda of Will spread throughout the world, and many forces in the world.

At the end of the world, the second super-perfect controller who condensed the Pagoda of Will was born.
